title: Layout-Safety Preflight Report
description: Deterministic JSON emitted by scripts/run-layout-safety-check.mjs (and the in-process preflightLayout from scripts/lib/check-layout-safety.mjs). Consumers: U6 repair-patch adapter, run-deck-pipeline summary block, workbench Visual Quality tab.

version.description: Optional schema/doc version. Omitted when not specified.

createdAt.description: Optional ISO8601 timestamp. Omitted when not specified to preserve byte-identical JSON across runs.

deckSize.description: Slide size in inches used for bounds checks.

slideId.description: Manifest slide id (e.g. 's1'). Optional; callers correlate by elementId when absent.

elementId.description: Id of the offending element within the slide.

relatedElementId.description: Second element id for pairwise checks (overlap, card-spacing). Optional.

kind.description: Detection category. Stable identifier; downstream tooling switches on this.

severity.description: Triage tier. Critical blocks pipeline in --strict mode; warning never blocks.

message.description: Human-readable explanation rendered in QA reports.

suggestion.description: Optional repair hint. Shape compatible with repair-patch.mjs operations: {operation, targetElementId, changes}. U6 adapter enforces strict enum; U5 schema is intentionally permissive to keep the writer stable while repair-patch operations evolve.

blocked.description: True when --strict-layout-safety is set and any critical was found.
